issues.description: Contains prerequisite quests (WHILE_GUTHIX_SLEEPS, HIS_FAITHFUL_SERVANTS) and diary tasks not actively progressed during slayer training - should only include actively progressed content

Contains many non-essential items: Shield left half, Verac's flail, Ring of endurance, Cooking gauntlets, Fish barrel, Karamja gloves, Magic logs, Opal, Jade, Red topaz are not needed for slayer training to 100cb. Keep only: Arclight, Amulet of glory, Slayer helmet
Teleport utility item - questionable necessity for slayer training
Quantity of 10,000 is unrealistic for this training step - likely data entry error or belongs in parent step
Unable to resolve - unclear if this is a real OSRS item or misspelling

notes: Step is primarily about slayer training consumables and combat gear. Abstract items correctly identify rune/potion categories. Item list is heavily contaminated with barrows drops, fletching materials, and unrelated equipment. Recommend: (1) clear itemsNeeded summary, (2) filter items to only Arclight/Glory/Slayer helmet, (3) resolve vile vigour reference, (4) reduce karambwan quantity or move to parent, (5) remove prerequisite quests from questIds array.

recommendations.itemsNeeded: Arclight, Slayer helmet, Amulet of glory, combat potions, food, runes for slaying
recommendations.questIds_remove: All - none are actively progressed during slayer training
